sglang.title: Support precomputed multimodal features for Qwen-VL and Gemma3 models.
sglang.author: ysulsky
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
When running a VLM via SGLang, it's useful to be able to supply image embeddings directly. For example maybe you've frozen your vision encoder and want to precompute features, or if you're using the VLM with a custom encoder.
Modifications

Support passing pre-expanded image-pad tokens by

sglang.title: feat: add dp attention support for Qwen 2/3 MoE models, fixes #6088
sglang.author: Fr4nk1inCs
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
This is the prerequisites of EP, which is introduced in PR #5917

Motivation

As described in #6088, DP attention is not supported for Qwen MoE models, but #5917 introduces EP MoE for them. This PR introduces DP attention support for them.
Modifications

Following DP Attention part in deepseek_v2.py

vllm.title: [Misc] Add Ray Prometheus logger to V1
vllm.author: eicherseiji
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Implements the following item from #10582:

[P1] Allow users to define their own prometheus client and other arbitrary loggers.

Tested with V1 as follows (with ray-project/ray#52719):
VLLM_USE_V1=1 python serve.py
#serve.py
import ray
from ray import serve
from ray.serve.llm import LLMConfig, build

vllm.title: use ceil_div in cutlass block scaling shape check

This pr updates a check to enable more problem shapes (e.g., N=2112) for cutlass blackwell block scale gemm.
CC @wenscarl

vllm.title: [Misc][MacOS] fix bfloat16 error
vllm.author: reidliu41
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
In MacOS When try to request the API,  and serve the model with auto dtype, it would cause the BFloat16 error  , it should fixed before 11696 based on description currently it should still need to  to modify cpu_extension.cmake to activate(and hard to make it).
seems update it in 5c4c08f#diff-7eaad0

vllm.title: [BugFix] Fix multi async save in MultiConnector
vllm.author: njhill
vllm.bodyExcerpt: The MultiKVConnector impl keeps track of cases where multiple connectors are async saving the same request, but this state needs to be shared from the scheduler side to the worker side.

vllm.title: [BugFix] Fix ordering of KVConnector finished send/rcv sets
vllm.author: njhill
vllm.bodyExcerpt: Still pending are multi-connector tests that cover the async modes for saving/loading.

vllm.title: [Sampler] Adapt to FlashInfer 0.2.3 sampler API
vllm.author: abmfy
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
FlashInfer 0.2.3 introduced some breaking changes to its sampler API, this PR updates the calling sites in vLLM to adapt to the update.
FIX #14815
FIX #15666

vllm.title: [V1][P/D] Local attention optimization for NIXL
vllm.author: mgoin
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Optimizes the V1 NixlConnector for Llama 4 models by implementing layer-specific KV cache transfers.
During the worker's register_kv_caches phase, it pre-calculates the attention window size (in blocks) for each layer based on the Llama 4 config (no_rope_layers and attention_chunk_size).
For RoPE la

vllm.title: Move cli args docs to its own page (#18228)
vllm.author: strangiato
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR moves the CLI docs out of the OpenAI-Compatible Server docs page, and out to it's own page.
Currently, these options are available in the OpenAI-Compatible Server docs page but it is buried in the middle of a large page and are not discoverable or easy to find from a google search.

vllm.title: [P/D][V1] Support dynamic loading of external KV connector implementations
vllm.author: sdavidbd
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR introduces a new mechanism to simplify the integration of external KV connectors in vLLM's V1 prefill-decode (P/D) disaggregation pipeline.
📌 Motivation
Currently, external packages implementing KVConnectorBase_V1 must define a connector class and upstream it into the vLLM codebase, even if
